title: Cobblemon Move Dex
description: Add the function of querying learnable Moves to Cobblemon's Pokedex.
body:
Add the function of querying learnable Moves to Cobblemon's Pokedex.  
You can search for "Learnable moves: LevelUp", "Learnable moves: TM", "Learnable moves: Tutor" or "Learnable: Egg" for Pokemon in Pokedex.
  
![pokedex preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6189be954fd2a1e3a769666f683757ce607e5895.png)
